rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF THOMAS J COLLIER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Quashing Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Tuesday, October 26, 2008. Petitioner Timothy Jones' Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoenas. Hearing required. The parties should be prepared to discuss whether the court's previous discovery order precludes the subject subpoenas, as well as the 5th amendment and privacy issues raised in the motion. = (610/PS)
